title: Hollow GUI
description: It is a GUI (and Hotbar) based on the Hollow Knight theme, mostly with a dark tone for more convenience!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cdd2054150336461872580420696c66ce120bc0.png)

# It is a GUI based on the Hollow Knight theme.

- +16 inventories follow the theme of the main inventory and texture.

- Changed menu buttons (and background).

- Changed the background texture of the potion effects.

## It does not require optifine, fabric, or other external elements to minecraft.

### If you want to support me you can follow me on my [Bluesky!](https://bsky.app/profile/meleew.bsky.social)

I will be posting soon to ask about suggestions for themes for future GUIs :D

### Any problems with this GUI please contact me on my discord **dona10_**

- The construction of the main menu was made by a friend and me, this construction can be found in the FFA map at sagang-ffa.fun
